english: out / out of (direction away from inside outward)
notes: Separable prefix used with many verbs (herauskommen, herausfinden, herausnehmen). Indicates movement or direction from inside to outside, toward the speaker. Often interchangeable with 'raus' in colloquial speech.

sentences.german: Komm heraus, wir warten auf dich!
sentences.english: Come out, we are waiting for you!

sentences.german: Sie nahm das Buch aus der Tasche heraus.
sentences.english: She took the book out of the bag.
